fields.headline: Welcome to the CMS demo
fields.subhead: Every field on this page is read through accessor-tracked calls. Edit src/cms/content.json and reload to see changes.

fields.headline: Hello, Alpha!
fields.body: This config matches only when the URL slug is 'alpha'.

fields.headline: Beta/Gamma view
fields.body: This config matches for 'beta' OR 'gamma' via the {in: [...]} clause.

fields.headline: Default greeting
fields.body: Visit /cms-demo/alpha, /cms-demo/beta, or /cms-demo/zulu to see cascade resolution in action.
